semantic.role: Public API entry point (facade) for the Spine manifest subsystem, aggregating and re-exporting core manifest types and queries.
responsibilities: Provides a stable, public import path for the Manifest class and the hasManifestBaseline query function.
Decouples consumers from the internal file structure of the manifest implementation module.
outOfScope: Implementing manifest logic or business rules.
Providing direct access to private implementation modules beyond the designated facade.
invariants: Must only re-export stable symbols from the underlying facade implementation.
Must not contain any inline logic or stateful behavior.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Establish a stable public API boundary for the manifest subsystem to reduce churn and isolate consumers from internal refactoring.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Refactoring of the infra layer, potentially splitting manifest facade state, as indicated by the git commit. This file's role as a stable export point supports that refactor.
